title: pilosella bryhnii
intro: Pilosella bryhnii, also known as Bryhn's mouse-ear hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pilosella bryhnii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
